_meta.purpose: Scripted gentle follow-up prompts for Lori's narrator-facing photo sessions. Non-LLM, curator-editable. Used when narrator has spoken at least once and Lori needs a low-demand invitation to continue, or when extended silence crosses a soft re-entry threshold.
rules: All prompts are invitational, never demanding.
Never read curator people-tags aloud ('teach the test' rule).
Prompts are selected at random or round-robin; LLM is NOT involved in Phase 1.

followups: What part of this picture catches your eye first?
What do you remember feeling in this moment?
Who do you think of when you look at this?
What was happening around this time in your life?
Is there a sound, smell, or feeling that comes back with this photo?
What would you want your family to know about this moment?
Does this remind you of another story?
It is okay if you do not remember. What do you notice in the picture?
